title: GrowGeneration Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2023 Financial Results
text: GrowGeneration Q4 2023 and Full Year 2023 Results. Full Year 2023: Net revenue: $226 million (exceeded guidance of $220-225M). Adjusted EBITDA: Loss of $5.6 million (within guidance). Q4 2023 Results: Revenue: $49.5 million (down ~9% vs prior year). Same-store sales: Down 3.6%. Net loss: $27.3 million ($0.44 per share) vs net loss of $15M in Q4 2022. Adjusted EBITDA: Loss of $3.7 million (vs loss of $10.2M in Q4 2022). Gross Profit: $11.6 million or 23.5% of revenue (vs $9.6M or 17.6% prior year). 2024 Guidance: Revenue: $205-215 million. Adjusted EBITDA: Loss of $2M to profit of $3M. Results showed margin improvement and EBITDA progress despite revenue headwinds from cannabis industry weakness.
